name: bav-pipeline
description: Business Analysis & Valuation coverage system — builds and maintains per-ticker equity valuations: strategy analysis, SEC EDGAR data assembly, condensed financials & DuPont decomposition, multi-scenario residual income models with an analytics layer (implied cost of capital, enterprise FCFF/WACC DCF cross-check, 2-D sensitivity heatmaps), plus a persistent Obsidian-compatible coverage vault with incremental earnings-driven updates. Skills: bav-pipeline (full build), bav-update (incremental refresh), bav-news (uncertainty-keyed media sweep), bav-brief (portfolio status).
